\tzpentry{ID5797}{Pressure Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5797 introduces Pressure Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{P}_{\mu\nu\alpha\beta}(s) = \frac{1}{2}\left(g_{\mu\alpha}g_{\nu\beta} + g_{\mu\beta}g_{\nu\alpha} - g_{\mu\nu}g_{\alpha\beta}\right) G_{\text{ret}}(s) \end{equation}
